title: schizodium cornutum
intro: Schizodium cornutum, also known as the 'horned schizodium', is a rare and lesser-known plant species belonging to the Aristolochiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial capabilities. The health benefits of Schizodium cornutum are said to include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried extract or infusion, often combined with other herbs to create teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
